item.title: WhatsApp Graph API version mismatch: v17.0 in validate vs v21.0 in connect
item.intent: WhatsApp integration uses a single, consistent Graph API version throughout. No version mismatch between the validation probe and the connect flow.
item.description: Two files reference different versions of the WhatsApp/Facebook Graph API: src/build/launcher/connect.ts:23 uses v21.0 (const WHATSAPP_API = 'https://graph.facebook.com/v21.0'), while src/evolve/integrate/validate.ts:115 uses v17.0. The credential validation probe and the actual connection flow must use the same API version. A probe that passes on v17.0 endpoints may not guarantee v21.0 compatibility and vice versa. Steps: (1) decide canonical version (v21.0 is newer — prefer that); (2) add WHATSAPP_API_VERSION = 'v21.0' and WHATSAPP_API_BASE = 'https://graph.facebook.com' to src/config/defaults.ts; (3) update connect.ts to use the constant; (4) update integrate/validate.ts to use the same version; (5) run tests. Scope: 3 files, ~5 line change.
